title: parathelypteris beddomei
intro: Parathelypteris beddomei, also known as the Beddome's fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, known for its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Parathelypteris beddomei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried or powdered for use in various traditional remedies.
